template:
defmodule Solution do
  defmacro safe_pipe(initial, pipeline) do
    pipeline
    |> [[SLOT macro_expand]]
    |> build_pipeline(initial)
  end

  defp build_pipeline([], acc) do
    quote do: [[SLOT ok_wrap]]
  end

  defp build_pipeline([{func, args} | rest], acc) do
    quote do
      case apply_stage(unquote(acc), unquote(func), unquote(args)) do
        {:ok, value} -> unquote(build_pipeline(rest, quote(do: value)))
        [[SLOT error_match]] -> err
        value -> unquote(build_pipeline(rest, quote(do: value)))
      end
    end
  end

  defp apply_stage(value, func, args) when [[SLOT fn_guard]] do
    apply(func, [value | args])
  end

  defp apply_stage(value, {module, function, extra_args}, []) do
    apply(module, function, [value | extra_args])
  end
end
prompt: Pick the macro expander, the ok-wrap, the error pattern, and the function guard.
